---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature for the plugin or workflow docs
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Why it matters

What value does this bring to users?

## Suggested solution

How do you imagine this working?

## Affected area

- [ ] Commands
- [ ] Agents
- [ ] Rules
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Hooks
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Community/process

## Will you open a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe
- [ ] No (request only)

## Additional context

Links, references, and examples.
